case_title: THREE RIVERS REAL ESTATE AND DEVELOPMENT, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER CONROY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CONROY, CHRISTOPHER

UD JURY CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2022 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-19-2022 AT 11:20 AM IN DEPT. 305, VISITING JUDGE HARRY JACOBS. DYLAN TONG FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER CONROY. TWO ATTEPMETS WERE MADE TO REACH MR. CONROY THIS MORNING WHEN HE FAILED TO APPEAR AS INSTRUCTED IN THE JUL-18-22 VOICEMAIL. BOTH BOTH CALLS ALSO WENT TO WENT TO VOICEMAIL. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2022 11:20 AM FOR DEPT 305
REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-19-2022 PER JUDGE'S ORDER SIGNED ON JUL-19-2022. VISITING JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS, CLERK: KEVIN RAYALA/ROSALLIE GUMPAL, NOT REPORTED (305).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THREE RIVERS REAL ESTATE AND DEVELOPMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CONROY, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
THREE RIVERS REAL ESTATE V CONROY - REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 67773769) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THREE RIVERS REAL ESTATE AND DEVELOPMENT, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THREE RIVERS REAL ESTATE AND DEVELOPMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONROY, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 885 25TH AVENUE APT. #102 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121 $4,710.86 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,710.86, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. PAST DUE RENT $1788.99, HOLDOVER DAMAGES $2921.87. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances by Dylan Tong, Esq. on behalf of Plaintiff Three Rivers Real Estate & Development, LLC. Tel: (415) 409-7611
Brian Szeto, Property Manager, also appears on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant.

The matter is transferred forthwith from Department 501 for a prove-up hearing in Department 305. Mr. Tong presented three day notice for the Court to review. The Court hears argument from Mr. Tong. The matter is submitted. Court signs judgment in favor of the Plaintiff.

Visiting Judge: Harry L. Jacobs, Clerk: Kevin Rayala/Rosallie Gumpal, Not Reported (305)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Off Calendar
